chief_complaint: A 57-year-old male former smoker with advanced COPD and severe upper-lobe predominant emphysema, referred for lung transplantation.
history: The patient had disabling dyspnea (mMRC 3), a BODE index of 6, and major pulmonary function impairment (FEV(1) 31% predicted; residual volume 329% predicted).
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings not provided.
labs: ECG, bloods, imaging, and other tests not provided. Pulmonary function tests showed FEV(1) 31% predicted, residual volume 329% predicted.
